ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR 6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Steven D. Cribb, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Northern California Collection Service, Inc.
No appearance by defendants Pacific Institute, a/k/a Pacific Instistute, Inc., and Agesong, Inc.
Defaults were entered against defendants on January 10, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed January 10, 2017.
Order granting waiver of witness appearance at prove-up hearing was filed on March 3, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Northern California Collection Service, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Pacific Institute, a/k/a Pacific Institute, Inc., and Agesong, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $87,544.21.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,345.04.
Costs - 565.80, for a total judgment in the amount of $96,455.05.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Continued To Jan-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
